summary: The reproduction clones the vulnerable Budibase commit, starts isolated CouchDB and MinIO support services, and runs a targeted Jest proof showing that a builder from workspace B can read a tenant-global API key written from workspace A.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should print the exact proof line `EVOHUNT_PROOF api_keys_cross_workspace_read EVOHUNT_SECRET=leaked-cross-workspace-secret`, demonstrating that a workspace-scoped builder can read a tenant-global API key created from another workspace.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` cloned `https://github.com/Budibase/budibase.git` at `c6bfe17485fd59e1b30cec6ba2d2a483515d0ae5`, started temporary CouchDB and MinIO containers, installed the repo dependencies inside the reproduction container, and executed the targeted Jest proof. The run emitted `EVOHUNT_PROOF api_keys_cross_workspace_read EVOHUNT_SECRET=leaked-cross-workspace-secret` and ended with `PASS packages/server/src/api/routes/tests/evohunt_apikeys.spec.ts`.
verification_method: The verification helper runs one focused Jest spec and captures its stdout. It succeeds only if both the exact `EVOHUNT_PROOF` disclosure line and the Jest `PASS` line are present, which distinguishes real cross-workspace secret disclosure from startup failures or unrelated test behavior.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out commit `c6bfe17485fd59e1b30cec6ba2d2a483515d0ae5`, copies the proof spec into the checkout, and mounts that checkout into the container at `/target-repo`.
